place: Laem Noi Beach, Bang Por, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Three-Pavilion Beachfront Villa, Bang Por
blurb: A serene single-storey beachfront villa composed as three minimalist pavilions on the golden sand of Laem Noi, Bang Por — set in a hidden bay beside the Four Seasons and the season-three White Lotus filming site, with a 14-metre saltwater infinity pool over the sea.
detail:
Nestled in a hidden bay on Koh Samui's quiet north shore — right next to the filming site of The White Lotus season three and the Four Seasons Resort — this elegant modern villa is secreted away from the hustle yet close to nearby amenities. The striking single-floor property is composed as three separate pavilions, comfortably accommodating up to six adults and a child across its three bedrooms, surrounded by lush tropical forest and rustling palms with breathtaking views of a neighbouring island.

Contemporary design keeps simplicity at its core: an open living area flows to an indoor dining space and open kitchen, opening out to a sun deck, an outdoor dining area with BBQ, and a seating area by the pool. The 14-metre salt-water infinity pool is ringed by eight sun-loungers with a shallow kid-friendly end, set right on the soft, tranquil sands of Laem Noi Beach — step straight from the deck to the sea, or take the two-person kayak out along the coast toward Nikki Beach and the Four Seasons.

The villa sits within a small, secure estate of five beachside villas with a guarded entrance, 24-hour CCTV and safety deposit boxes. Each bedroom is en-suite and air-conditioned, with a 75-inch Smart TV, sound system and high-speed WiFi throughout. Two staff are permanently on-site with daily breakfast included, and a private chef, yoga and tailored tours can be arranged on request.

features.l: On the sand at Laem Noi Beach
Beside Four Seasons & White Lotus bay
